meta.title: Tramar Muro Alto — Short-term rentals in Muro Alto, Pernambuco
meta.description: Two studio flats curated with Pernambucan craft at Makai Acqua Resort, Muro Alto. Caruaru ceramics, renaissance lace, attentive rest.

hero.tagline: Woven with the best Pernambuco has to offer.
hero.subtitle: Two studio flats at Makai Acqua Resort, Muro Alto. A curation of Pernambucan craft.
hero.imageAlt: Tropical beach of Muro Alto, Pernambuco

curadoria.title: What we bring
curadoria.text: Each flat is curated with real Pernambucan craft. The ceramics you use at breakfast come from Caruaru. The lace on the pillow is renascença from Pesqueira. The textiles passed from hand to hand, not from a catalog. Curation is the heart of Tramar.
curadoria.imageAlt: Hands shaping handcrafted ceramics from Caruaru

manifesto.text: We believe that resting well is, at its core, paying attention. Attention to the weave of the hammock, the clay of the cup, the sound of the tide, the time that passes differently when no one is in a hurry. Tramar is a beach house woven with the best Pernambuco has to offer: the artisan's hand, the craft of those who make, the calm of those who live by the sea. You arrive, you rest, and you take a piece of this weave home.

carua.name: Tramar Caruá
carua.tagline: Beachfront studio with the weight of Caruaru clay and the fiber of Atlantic forest. For 2 to 3 guests.

renda.name: Tramar Renda
renda.tagline: Beachfront studio with the lightness of renaissance lace and the light of Olinda facades. For 2 to 3 guests.

inteira.name: Tramar Inteira
inteira.tagline: The whole house, the whole weave, the whole rest. Up to 8 guests.

gallery.title: The house in images
gallery.photoCredit: Provisional photos: Unsplash. Official space photos coming soon.

location.title: Where we are
location.text: Makai Acqua Resort, Muro Alto, Pernambuco. 50 minutes from Recife airport. 8 minutes from Porto de Galinhas natural pools.
location.pdgText: Porto de Galinhas natural pools are 8 minutes from Makai Acqua Resort. You wake up on the balcony, have coffee in the house ceramics, and minutes later you are at Pernambuco's most celebrated coastline.
location.pdgCaption: Porto de Galinhas natural pools — 8 min from Makai

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: How many guests fit in each flat?
faq.a1: Each flat comfortably accommodates up to 3 guests. The Tramar Inteira product, with both flats combined, accommodates up to 8. (TODO: confirm final capacity with owner)
faq.a2: (TODO: confirm pet policy with the condominium and owners)
faq.q3: How does check-in and check-out work?
faq.a3: Check-in is at 3 PM and check-out at 11 AM. For other times, check availability at booking. (TODO: confirm with operations)
faq.q4: What's included in the daily rate?
faq.a4: Full access to the Makai Acqua Resort water complex: current pool, water slides, beach tennis, restaurant, fitness center, and kids area. (TODO: confirm full amenity list with resort)
faq.a5: Yes, Makai Acqua Resort offers parking for guests. (TODO: confirm whether there's an additional fee)
